title: Top 10 Hotel Analytics Tools 2026: Data & Revenue Insights Guide
description: Top hotel analytics for 2026: Compare top platforms, pricing & features. Cut costs 20-30%, boost efficiency 25-40% for your business. Automate operatio.
content:
Hotel Data Analytics Platforms: Intelligent Engine for Data-Driven Decision Making

Hotel data analytics platforms are core tools for data-driven decision making, covering four modules: revenue analysis, occupancy analysis, guest analysis, and competitor analysis. In 2026, hotel data analytics upgraded from Excel manual analysis to intelligent platforms, with real-time data integration, visual reports, and AI forecasting becoming three major trends. Traditional hotel data analytics relied on Excel spreadsheets, manual statistics, and experience judgment, resulting in low efficiency, limited accuracy, and difficulty in real-time response. Intelligent data analytics platforms solve these pain points through real-time integration, visual display, and AI forecasting, improving decision efficiency and accuracy. This article deeply reviews three mainstream data analytics platforms: Duetto Scoreboard, IDeaS G3, and Hotel Intelligence, providing decision basis for hotel data analytics.

Core Review Platform Introduction

Duetto Scoreboard: Cloud Real-Time Data Analytics Platform

Duetto Scoreboard originates from Duetto and is a cloud real-time data analytics platform. It serves 3000+ hotel clients globally, focusing on real-time revenue analysis, real-time occupancy analysis, and real-time competitor analysis. Duetto Scoreboard's core advantage lies in real-time capability, with real-time data integration, real-time report updates, and real-time forecast adjustments. Hotels can monitor revenue, occupancy, and competitor prices in real-time through Duetto Scoreboard, quickly responding to market changes. Duetto Scoreboard integrates deeply with Duetto RMS, combining data analytics and revenue management.

IDeaS G3: Revenue-Oriented Data Analytics Platform

IDeaS G3 originates from IDeaS and is a revenue-oriented data analytics platform. It serves 15000+ hotel clients globally, focusing on revenue analysis, demand forecasting, and competitor analysis. IDeaS G3's core advantage lies in revenue analysis depth, with RevPAR analysis, ADR analysis, OCC analysis, and revenue trend analysis. Hotels can optimize revenue strategies and maximize revenue through IDeaS G3 revenue analysis. IDeaS G3 integrates deeply with IDeaS RMS, combining data analytics and revenue management. Large hotel groups rely on IDeaS G3 for group revenue analysis.

Hotel Intelligence: Comprehensive Hotel Data Analytics Platform

Hotel Intelligence was established in 2015, headquartered in London, and is a comprehensive hotel data analytics platform. It serves 5000+ hotel clients globally, focusing on revenue analysis, guest analysis, market analysis, and operations analysis. Hotel Intelligence's core advantage lies in comprehensiveness, with revenue analysis, guest analysis, market analysis, and operations analysis four modules integrated. Hotels can gain comprehensive insights into hotel operations through Hotel Intelligence comprehensive data analytics. Hotel Intelligence is particularly suitable for hotels needing comprehensive analysis, with multi-dimensional data analytics improving decision comprehensiveness.

Revenue Analysis Capability Comparison

RevPAR Analysis

RevPAR (Revenue Per Available Room) analysis is the core indicator of revenue analysis, including RevPAR calculation, RevPAR trends, and RevPAR comparison. IDeaS G3 RevPAR analysis is most complete, with RevPAR real-time calculation, RevPAR trend analysis (daily trends, monthly trends, annual trends), and RevPAR comparison (historical comparison, similar hotel comparison). Hotels can monitor revenue performance and optimize revenue strategies through IDeaS G3 RevPAR analysis. Duetto Scoreboard RevPAR analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time RevPAR calculation and real-time RevPAR trends. Hotel Intelligence RevPAR analysis is comprehensive, with RevPAR calculation, RevPAR trends, and RevPAR comparison.

ADR Analysis

ADR (Average Daily Rate) analysis is a key indicator of revenue analysis, including ADR calculation, ADR trends, and ADR comparison. IDeaS G3 ADR analysis is most complete, with ADR real-time calculation, ADR trend analysis (daily trends, monthly trends, annual trends), and ADR comparison (historical comparison, similar hotel comparison). Hotels can monitor pricing strategies and optimize pricing through IDeaS G3 ADR analysis. Duetto Scoreboard ADR analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time ADR calculation and real-time ADR trends. Hotel Intelligence ADR analysis is comprehensive, with ADR calculation, ADR trends, and ADR comparison.

OCC Analysis

OCC (Occupancy) analysis is a basic indicator of revenue analysis, including OCC calculation, OCC trends, and OCC forecasting. IDeaS G3 OCC analysis is most complete, with OCC real-time calculation, OCC trend analysis (daily trends, monthly trends, annual trends), and OCC forecasting (demand forecasting, occupancy forecasting). Hotels can monitor occupancy and forecast demand through IDeaS G3 OCC analysis. Duetto Scoreboard OCC analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time OCC calculation and real-time OCC trends. Hotel Intelligence OCC analysis is comprehensive, with OCC calculation, OCC trends, and OCC forecasting.

Revenue Trend Analysis

Revenue trend analysis is an advanced function of revenue analysis, including revenue trend charts, revenue trend forecasting, and revenue trend comparison. IDeaS G3 revenue trend analysis is most complete, with revenue trend charts (visual trends), revenue trend forecasting (AI forecasting), and revenue trend comparison (historical comparison, similar hotel comparison). Hotels can forecast revenue and optimize revenue strategies through IDeaS G3 revenue trend analysis. Duetto Scoreboard revenue trend analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time revenue trend charts and real-time revenue trend forecasting. Hotel Intelligence revenue trend analysis is comprehensive, with revenue trend charts, revenue trend forecasting, and revenue trend comparison.

Guest Analysis Capability

Guest Source Analysis

Guest source analysis is a core function of guest analysis, including OTA guests, direct booking guests, GDS guests, and corporate guest source analysis. Hotel Intelligence guest source analysis is most complete, with OTA guest proportion, direct booking guest proportion, GDS guest proportion, corporate guest proportion, and guest source trend analysis. Hotels can optimize channel strategies and increase direct booking proportion through Hotel Intelligence guest source analysis. Duetto Scoreboard guest source analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time guest source analysis and real-time guest source trends. IDeaS G3 guest source analysis is revenue-oriented, combining guest source with RevPAR analysis.

Guest Value Analysis

Guest value analysis is an advanced function of guest analysis, including guest spending amount, guest loyalty, and guest lifetime value. Hotel Intelligence guest value analysis is most complete, with guest spending amount analysis (average spending, spending trends), guest loyalty analysis (repeat purchase rate, loyalty trends), and guest lifetime value analysis (LTV calculation, LTV forecasting). Hotels can identify high-value guests and optimize guest marketing through Hotel Intelligence guest value analysis. Duetto Scoreboard guest value analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time guest value analysis. IDeaS G3 guest value analysis is revenue-oriented, combining guest value with revenue analysis.

Guest Behavior Analysis

Guest behavior analysis is a refined function of guest analysis, including guest booking behavior, guest stay behavior, and guest spending behavior. Hotel Intelligence guest behavior analysis is most complete, with guest booking behavior analysis (booking channels, booking time, booking preferences), guest stay behavior analysis (stay duration, room type preferences), and guest spending behavior analysis (dining spending, SPA spending). Hotels can understand guest behavior and optimize services through Hotel Intelligence guest behavior analysis. Duetto Scoreboard guest behavior analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time guest behavior analysis. IDeaS G3 guest behavior analysis is revenue-oriented, combining guest behavior with revenue analysis.

Parameter Comparison Table

Comparison DimensionDuetto ScoreboardIDeaS G3Hotel IntelligenceComparison Analysis
RevPAR AnalysisReal-time RevPARMost complete RevPAR analysisComprehensive RevPAR analysisIDeaS G3 RevPAR analysis strongest
ADR AnalysisReal-time ADRMost complete ADR analysisComprehensive ADR analysisIDeaS G3 ADR analysis strongest
OCC AnalysisReal-time OCCMost complete OCC analysisComprehensive OCC analysisIDeaS G3 OCC analysis strongest
Revenue Trend AnalysisReal-time trend forecastingMost complete trend analysisComprehensive trend analysisIDeaS G3 revenue trends strongest
Guest Source AnalysisReal-time source analysisRevenue-oriented analysisMost complete source analysisHotel Intelligence guest source strongest
Guest Value AnalysisReal-time value analysisRevenue-oriented analysisMost complete value analysisHotel Intelligence guest value strongest
Guest Behavior AnalysisReal-time behavior analysisRevenue-oriented analysisMost complete behavior analysisHotel Intelligence guest behavior strongest
Competitor AnalysisReal-time competition analysisComplete competition analysisComprehensive competition analysisDuetto Scoreboard real-time capability strongest
Pricing Model$300-1500/month$500-3000/month$200-1000/monthHotel Intelligence pricing most flexible
Client Size3000+ hotels15000+ hotels5000+ hotelsIDeaS G3 market share largest

Competitor Analysis Capability

Competitor Price Scraping

Competitor price scraping is a core function of competitor analysis, including competitor OTA price scraping and competitor price trend analysis. Duetto Scoreboard competitor price scraping is most real-time, with hourly scraping of competitor OTA prices, real-time price trend analysis, and real-time price comparison. Hotels can monitor competitor prices in real-time and quickly respond to price changes through Duetto Scoreboard. IDeaS G3 competitor price scraping is complete, with daily scraping of competitor prices and price trend analysis. Hotel Intelligence competitor price scraping is comprehensive, with competitor price scraping, price trend analysis, and price comparison.

Competitor Occupancy Analysis

Competitor occupancy analysis is a supplementary function of competitor analysis, including competitor occupancy estimation and competitor occupancy trends. Hotel Intelligence competitor occupancy analysis is most complete, with competitor occupancy estimation (based on market data) and competitor occupancy trend analysis. Hotels can understand market competition and optimize pricing strategies through Hotel Intelligence competitor occupancy analysis. Duetto Scoreboard competitor occupancy analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time competitor occupancy estimation. IDeaS G3 competitor occupancy analysis is revenue-oriented, combining competitor occupancy with RevPAR analysis.

Competitor Market Positioning Analysis

Competitor market positioning analysis is an advanced function of competitor analysis, including competitor positioning, competitor differentiation, and competitor strengths and weaknesses. Hotel Intelligence competitor market positioning analysis is most complete, with competitor positioning analysis (market positioning, guest positioning), competitor differentiation analysis, and competitor strengths and weaknesses analysis. Hotels can understand market competition and optimize differentiation strategies through Hotel Intelligence competitor positioning analysis. Duetto Scoreboard competitor positioning analysis has strongest real-time capability, with real-time competitor positioning analysis. IDeaS G3 competitor positioning analysis is revenue-oriented, combining competitor positioning with revenue analysis.

Visual Report Capability

Report Visual Design

Report visual design is a key function of data analysis, including chart design, dashboard design, and report customization. Duetto Scoreboard report visual design is most modern, with modern dashboard design, visual charts, and real-time data updates. Hotels can monitor data in real-time through Duetto Scoreboard modern dashboards. IDeaS G3 report visual design is complete, with professional report design and revenue analysis charts. Hotel Intelligence report visual design is comprehensive, with comprehensive dashboard design and multi-dimensional charts.

Report Customization Capability

Report customization capability is an advanced function of data analysis, including report customization, report export, and report sharing. Hotel Intelligence report customization capability is most complete, with report customization (custom reports, custom indicators), report export (PDF export, Excel export), and report sharing (email sharing, team sharing). Hotels can customize personalized reports and meet specific needs through Hotel Intelligence report customization. Duetto Scoreboard report customization capability is cloud-based, with cloud report customization. IDeaS G3 report customization capability is complete, with professional report customization.

Report Automated Updates

Report automated updates is a real-time function of data analysis, including report auto updates, report scheduled updates, and report push notifications. Duetto Scoreboard report automated updates is most real-time, with report real-time auto updates and real-time report push notifications. Hotels can quickly respond to data changes through Duetto Scoreboard real-time reports. IDeaS G3 report automated updates is complete, with report scheduled auto updates and scheduled report push. Hotel Intelligence report automated updates is comprehensive, with report auto updates and report scheduled push.

Application Scenario Recommendations

Strong Real-time Response Need Hotels

Hotels with strong real-time response needs should choose Duetto Scoreboard. Its leading real-time capability, real-time data integration, real-time report updates, and real-time forecast adjustments match real-time needs. Urban hotels and boutique hotels have strong real-time response needs. Duetto Scoreboard real-time data analytics helps hotels quickly respond to market changes. Duetto integrates deeply with RMS, combining data analytics and revenue management.

Strong Revenue-Oriented Need Hotels

Hotels with strong revenue-oriented needs should choose IDeaS G3. Its revenue analysis depth, complete RevPAR analysis, and revenue trend analysis match revenue needs. Large hotel groups and high-end hotels have strong revenue-oriented needs. IDeaS G3 revenue analysis optimizes revenue strategies and maximizes revenue. IDeaS G3 forecasting accuracy is highest, with demand forecasting leading.

Strong Comprehensive Analysis Need Hotels

Hotels with strong comprehensive analysis needs should choose Hotel Intelligence. Its leading comprehensiveness, revenue analysis, guest analysis, market analysis, and operations analysis integrated match comprehensive needs. Resort hotels and medium-sized hotel groups have strong comprehensive analysis needs. Hotel Intelligence comprehensive data analytics provides comprehensive insights into hotel operations and improves decision comprehensiveness. Hotel Intelligence pricing is flexible, affordable for medium-sized hotels.

2026 Data Analytics Development Trends

AI Forecasting Deepening

AI forecasting upgrades from basic forecasting to deep forecasting, with AI deep learning forecasting demand, forecasting revenue, and forecasting guest behavior. By 2027, 60% of data analytics platforms are expected to integrate AI deep forecasting. IDeaS G3 has already achieved AI forecasting. AI forecasting accuracy can increase to 97%, significantly improving decision accuracy.

Real-time Data Analytics Full Coverage

Real-time data analytics extends from revenue to hotel full dimensions, with real-time revenue analysis, real-time guest analysis, and real-time operations analysis. By 2026, 50% of hotels are expected to achieve full-dimension real-time analysis. Duetto Scoreboard real-time capability leads, with full-dimension real-time analysis.

Guest Analysis Refinement

Guest analysis upgrades from basic statistics to refined analysis, with guest behavior analysis, guest value analysis, and guest lifecycle analysis. By 2027, 40% of data analytics platforms are expected to achieve refined guest analysis. Hotel Intelligence guest analysis leads, with complete guest behavior analysis.

Competitor Analysis Intelligence

Competitor analysis upgrades from price scraping to intelligent analysis, with competitor pricing strategy forecasting and competitor market share analysis. By 2028, 30% of data analytics platforms are expected to achieve intelligent competitor analysis. Duetto Scoreboard real-time competitor analysis leads.

Selection Recommendation Summary

Data analytics platform selection requires comprehensive consideration of three dimensions: real-time needs, revenue needs, and comprehensive needs. Hotels with strong real-time response needs should prioritize Duetto Scoreboard, with leading real-time capability and real-time data analytics matching real-time needs. Hotels with strong revenue-oriented needs should prioritize IDeaS G3, with deep revenue analysis and leading forecasting accuracy. Hotels with strong comprehensive analysis needs should prioritize Hotel Intelligence, with leading comprehensiveness and multi-dimensional analysis matching comprehensive needs. AI forecasting deepening, real-time data analytics full coverage, guest analysis refinement, and competitor analysis intelligence are four major trends in 2026. Selection should focus on platform layouts in these directions.

HouseCar Lifestyle: Digital Nomad Freedom

Time saved = life earned. Automate—work from RV, cabin, beach. Stop tethering to offices. Let AI handle work while you chase sunsets. HouseCar: Automate, liberate, live free.

howto_schema.name: How to use Hotel Analytics Tools

step.name: Identify Your Requirements
step.text: Assess your specific needs for Hotel Analytics Tools. Determine key features, budget constraints, integration requirements, and scalability needs. Document your requirements to guide the selection process.

step.name: Research Available Options
step.text: Research and compare different Hotel Analytics Tools solutions. Review features, pricing, user reviews, and vendor reputation. Create a shortlist of 3-5 potential solutions that meet your requirements.

step.name: Evaluate Key Features
step.text: Evaluate each shortlisted Hotel Analytics Tools solution against your requirements. Test key features through demos or trials. Assess ease of use, integration capabilities, and support quality.

step.name: Make Your Selection
step.text: Select the Hotel Analytics Tools solution that best fits your needs. Consider total cost, implementation timeline, training requirements, and long-term scalability. Negotiate terms and finalize the contract.

step.name: Implement and Optimize
step.text: Implement your chosen Hotel Analytics Tools solution. Set up integrations, train users, and establish workflows. Monitor performance metrics and continuously optimize based on feedback and results.
